layer_1_basic_player_info: Game capsule, records, conference context, recent form, main stakes.
layer_2_team_role_roster_function: Offensive identity, pitching identity, strengths, weaknesses, what they need today.
layer_3_cross_team_matchup_intelligence: Cross-roster ties, shared hometowns, opponent strengths vs weaknesses.
layer_4_broadcast_storylines: Pregame, first-inning, midgame, late-game, and team identity storylines.
layer_5_abstract_color_research: Slow-inning color tied to team location, mascot, ballpark, region, or history.
broadcast_notes: Short HUD note for the bottom HUD Notes button.
one_liner: One sentence that frames this team today.
follow_up: Pronunciations, missing records, local leads, coach details to confirm.

layer_1_basic_player_info: Basic bio, season stats, recent box score production, awards, pronunciation.
layer_2_team_role_roster_function: Role on roster with statistical or usage reason.
layer_3_cross_team_matchup_intelligence: Matchup notes, same hometown/high school/state ties, hitter-vs-pitcher angles.
layer_4_broadcast_storylines: Player story capsule and ready game situations for using it.
layer_5_abstract_color_research: Tethered color hook from hometown, name, school, previous college, or region.
broadcast_notes: Short manual note that also appears at the top of the player NOTE overlay.
abstract_hook: Odd but usable hook tied back to the player.
follow_up: Any uncertain facts or pronunciation questions.
